author: Siliconera
text:
Summer Aventurine and Robin Honkai: Star Rail Alts Appear
The  Summer Planarcadia alts for Aventurine and Robin in Honkai: Star Rail are Adventurine • Waveflair and Robin • Summeretto.

author: Siliconera
text:
More Inazuma Eleven and Sanrio Merchandise Appears
Reize, Burn, and Gazelle fans have no rights, apparently.

author: Siliconera
text:
Hear the Aimer SAO Echoes of Aincrad Opening Movie Theme Song
The new Sword Art Online Echoes of Aincrad opening movie trailer appeared and includes the Aimer theme song.

author: Siliconera
text:
UGREEN Honkai: Star Rail Yao Guang Merchandise Debuts
The five items in the UGREEN Honkai: Star Rail Yao Guang merchandise collection that includes power banks are now live.

author: Siliconera
text:
Persona 30th Anniversary Lawson Campaign Launches in Japan
The convenience store chain offers various items ranging from clear file giveaways to on-demand bromide prints.

author: Siliconera
text:
Infold Canceled Love and Deepspace 6th Love Interest Valko
The sixth Love and Deepspace love interest Valko is completely canceled following complaints and outcry from some players.

author: Siliconera
text:
Rise Can Do More in Battle in Persona 4 Revival
Rie Kugimiya will reprise her role in the Japanese dub.

author: Siliconera
text:
Splatoon Raiders Direct Reveals New Gameplay Details
The Splatoon Raiders Nintendo Direct went over the campaign gameplay, equipment, and multiplayer.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: Dark Scrolls Feels Unbalanced
Doinksoft embraced the Ghosts ’n Ghosts style for Dark Scrolls, but left certain characters and modes feeling unbalanced.

author: Siliconera
text:
Netflix Making Live-Action Persona TV Show Based on Game Series
Netflix is apparently making a live-action Persona show based on the game series, following anime and stage adaptations.

author: Siliconera
text:
FuRyu Making Demon Slayer Shinobu Figure and Nichirin Blade Replica Sword
Next month, a new Demon Slayer Shinobu Kocho noodle stopper figure and replica of her Nichirin blade sword will launch in Japan.

author: Siliconera
text:
Season 2 of Witch Hat Atelier Will Be Streaming on Crunchyroll
The Witch Hat Atelier anime adaptation will continue, with season 2 streaming on Crunchyroll.

author: Siliconera
text:
Splatoon Raiders Nintendo Direct and Treehouse Live Announced
A Splatoon Raiders Nintendo Direct and Treehouse Live will share more details about the spin-off game this week.

author: Siliconera
text:
Persona 3, 4, and 5 Goddess of Victory: NIKKE Crossover Teased
The Summer 2026 event starts soon and a Persona 3, 4, and 5 crossover comes to Goddess of Victory: NIKKE in 2026.
